title: Semaphore Keycloak OIDC integration live apply
summary: Attempt ADR 0361 live apply from the 0.178.116 source tree, confirm the Semaphore and Keycloak repo surfaces still validate, then stop the production converge when proxmox-host and routed guest connectivity time out from the workstation so no platform changes are made.

verification.check: Focused Semaphore and Keycloak repo tests
verification.observed: The targeted pytest slice for Semaphore runtime, Semaphore playbook, and Keycloak runtime passed with 32 tests before any live apply attempt.

make syntax-check-semaphore, make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-semaphore, and ./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces all passed; preflight correctly reported keycloak_semaphore_client_secret as absent-before-apply.

verification.check: Broader repo baseline on the live-apply source tree
verification.observed: A wider dependency-graph and completeness slice reported one unrelated current-mainline litellm dependency assertion drift outside ADR 0361 ownership, but no Semaphore or Keycloak regressions.
make converge-semaphore env=production reached the scoped Ansible run and then failed because SSH to proxmox-host at 100.64.0.1 timed out.
SSH, curl, and tailscale probes to proxmox-host and runtime-control either timed out or were refused, and the local Tailscale client reported stale coordination-server health.

notes: This historical blocked receipt was normalized to the current schema on 2026-04-14 from the original branch evidence.
The local Tailscale client still listed proxmox-host-subnet-router online at 100.64.0.1, but the workstation had no usable host or routed-guest management path during the attempt.
The macOS App Store or TestFlight Tailscale build on the workstation did not provide tailscale ssh, so there was no mesh-shell fallback for the blocked converge.

attempted_commands.failure: ssh: connect to host 100.64.0.1 port 22: Operation timed out

repo_validation.command: uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_semaphore_runtime_role.py tests/test_semaphore_playbook.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py

uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest -q tests/test_dependency_graph.py tests/test_preflight_controller_local.py tests/test_validate_service_completeness.py tests/test_secret_rotation.py
repo_validation.details: 25 passed, 1 failed; the lone failure is the unrelated current-mainline litellm dependency-graph assertion drift

environment_notes: tailscale status --json still listed proxmox-host-subnet-router online at 100.64.0.1, but the local client reported coordination-server health warnings and there was no usable host or routed-guest management path from this workstation
tailscale ssh could not be used as a fallback because the macOS App Store or TestFlight build installed on this machine does not provide that subcommand
next_steps: Restore working reachability to proxmox-host or provide the correct LV3_PROXMOX_HOST_ADDR for this workstation.
Verify /api/ping, /auth/oidc/login, make semaphore-manage ACTION=list-projects, and the seeded Semaphore Self-Test template.
Record the successful live-apply receipt, update ADR 0361 from Partial to Live applied, and then perform the exact-main integration step for protected release surfaces.
